since_last: 31% of 101 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.46%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.41% · BTC -2.15% · Gold -2.45% · Nasdaq100 -2.09%. 31% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.46%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.46%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.11%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -14.15%
cards.body: Leaders: GEV +4.54%, HON +4.36%, SKHY +4.09%, AVAV +3.59%, MU +3.19%. Laggards: TSLA -14.15%, CRNC -8.68%, GOOGL -6.52%, SYM -5.13%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.99% at $116.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.99% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
